caption: The video captures a professional interview taking place at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated at a round table equipped with a laptop and some papers. The interviewer, on the left, is animatedly speaking and gesturing with his hands, emphasizing points as he engages with the interviewee on the right, who listens attentively. The background shows a bustling conference hall with attendees walking around, adding to the lively atmosphere of the event. The setting suggests a formal yet dynamic discussion, likely centered around topics related to MongoDB and its applications in the tech industry.
